name: Remove entry

**Entry to remove**

Name and URL of the entry.

**Reason**

- [ ] Dead link (404 or redirect loop)
- [ ] Project archived or abandoned (no activity in 12+ months)
- [ ] Entry no longer meets the quality bar
- [ ] Duplicate of another entry
- [ ] Other (explain below)

**Details**

Provide any relevant context.
